# MNNIT InfoHub

> Social platform for students of Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology, Allahabad — feed, campus info, timetables, grades, and shared resources.

MNNIT InfoHub connects MNNIT students through a real-time social feed and academic utilities. Access to interactions and admin features is restricted to verified @mnnit.ac.in accounts; core content pages are publicly viewable.

## Pages

- [Home / Feed](/): Real-time student feed with posts, likes, and comments.
- [Explore](/explore): Discover students, trending posts, and communities.
- [Campus Info](/campus): Hostels, departments, faculty contacts, and campus information.
- [Academic Calendar](/calendar): Exams, holidays, and key institute events.
- [Timetable](/timetable): Branch- and semester-wise class timetables.
- [Grades](/grades): CPI / SPI calculator using the official MNNIT grading scheme.
- [Resources](/resources): Shared notes and previous year papers by branch and semester.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in with an @mnnit.ac.in account.
- [Notifications](/notifications): Personal activity feed (auth required).
- [Profile](/profile): User profile, followers, skills, GitHub link.
